FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct ProgressRing.ProgressRingTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Computed geometry for one ProgressRing (the audit's P3 TemplateSettings convention — mirrors WinUI's ProgressRingTemplateSettings, recomputed once from the control's size, never inside a per-frame bind). Sweep is the determinate accent-arc sweep in degrees (value·360). For the indeterminate ring it is the fixed visible arc length the rotation loop spins.

public readonly record struct ProgressRing.ProgressRingTemplateSettings : IEquatable<ProgressRing.ProgressRingTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<ProgressRing.ProgressRingTemplateSettings>

Constructors

ProgressRingTemplateSettings(float, float, float, float)

Computed geometry for one ProgressRing (the audit's P3 TemplateSettings convention — mirrors WinUI's ProgressRingTemplateSettings, recomputed once from the control's size, never inside a per-frame bind). Sweep is the determinate accent-arc sweep in degrees (value·360). For the indeterminate ring it is the fixed visible arc length the rotation loop spins.

ProgressRing.ProgressRingTemplateSettings
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
